text: Being here, I am struck by the atmosphere of anticipation and curiosity. The space feels designed for exploration and experimentation; the wall speaks of research and development, the environment is clean, modern, perhaps a little sterile. I feel like I am standing at the edge of something innovative, invited to question and interact with new ideas. The subdued lighting and the angled perspective make me slightly disoriented, yet that disorientation fuels my wonder—how easily the familiar can become mysterious, demanding that I adjust my focus and reconsider my surroundings.
